mapper.sql: t.id, t.approval_id, t.approval_no, t.order_id, t.approval_type, t.approval_status, t.apply_user_id, t.apply_role, t.apply_reason, t.change_snapshot, t.current_node_no, t.executor_result, t.submit_time, t.finish_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_approval t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_approval t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_approval t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_approval ( approval_id, approval_no, order_id, approval_type, approval_status, apply_user_id, apply_role, apply_reason, change_snapshot, current_node_no, executor_result, submit_time, finish_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{approvalId}, #{approvalNo}, #{orderId}, #{approvalType}, #{approvalStatus}, #{applyUserId}, #{applyRole}, #{applyReason}, #{changeSnapshot}, #{currentNodeNo}, #{executorResult}, #{submitTime}, #{finishTime}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_approval ( approval_id, approval_no, order_id, approval_type, approval_status, apply_user_id, apply_role, apply_reason, change_snapshot, current_node_no, executor_result, submit_time, finish_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.approvalId}, #{item.approvalNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.approvalType}, #{item.approvalStatus}, #{item.applyUserId}, #{item.applyRole}, #{item.applyReason}, #{item.changeSnapshot}, #{item.currentNodeNo}, #{item.executorResult}, #{item.submitTime}, #{item.finishTime}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_approval t SET
t.approval_status = #{approvalStatus},
t.current_node_no = #{currentNodeNo},
t.executor_result = #{executorResult},
t.finish_time = #{finishTime},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_approval t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
